headline: Jim Cramer on Huntington Bancshares: “Regionals Maybe Where the Action Is in 2026”
summary: Huntington Bancshares (NASDAQ:HBAN) is among Jim Cramer’s recent stock calls as he urged investors to stand by the defense sector. Starting the round of “Am I Diversified, ” a club member noted that their top 5 portfolio holdings are BG, FCX, HBAN, NVDA, and WMT. Cramer replied: First, I want to say this is a […]
